failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'Florianópolis')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'Florianópolis')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
